Databases.Name: Sample E-Commerce
Databases.Context: Sample e-commerce database with three tables. The 'users' table stores customer information (Name, Email, CreatedUtc). The 'orders' table tracks purchases with a foreign key to users (UserId) and includes OrderDate, Total, and Status fields. The 'line_items' table holds individual order items with a foreign key to orders (OrderId) and includes ProductName, Quantity, and UnitPrice. Typical queries: find orders by user, calculate order totals, list products purchased.

Databases.Name: Jurat Staging Database
Databases.Context:
Jurat digital notary journal platform (staging). SaaS application for notaries to manage electronic notarizations, signings, and journal entries. 40 tables in the enotary schema. Almost all relationships are implicit via guid columns (only sharerequest has declared FKs). Every table has its own guid column as a natural key; integer PKs are auto-increment surrogates.

TABLE RELATIONSHIPS:

usermaster is the central entity. 27 tables reference it via usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid:
  apikey, blob, combinedclientsignerdata, device, doccoll, doctype, fingerprint, identification, journalexport, location, masterclientidentification, masterclientsigner, notaryentry, paymentcard, paymenttxn, signature, signing, signingdraft, signingfee, signingmasterclientidentification, signingmasterclientsigner, subscription, userlogin, usernotificationpreference, userprofile, userrolemap, userscanpreference, usersignature, witness.
usermaster.tenantguid -> tenant.guid (multi-tenancy).

SIGNING WORKFLOW CHAIN (the core business process):
  signing is a notarization session owned by a notary (usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid).
  signing.deviceguid -> device.guid (which device was used).
  signing.userprofileguid -> userprofile.guid (which notary commission was used).
  signing.draftguid -> signingdraft.guid (if created from a draft).
  signing.requestguid references an external signing request.

  notaryentry represents individual notarized documents within a signing.
    notaryentry.signingguid -> signing.guid (many entries per signing, avg ~3.7).
    notaryentry.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

  signature captures signer signatures on a notary entry.
    signature.notaryentryguid -> notaryentry.guid.
    signature.witnessguid -> witness.guid (if witnessed).
    signature.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

  fingerprint captures thumbprints/fingerprints per notary entry.
    fingerprint.notaryentryguid -> notaryentry.guid.
    fingerprint.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

  witness records witnesses present at a notary entry.
    witness.notaryentryguid -> notaryentry.guid.
    witness.identificationguid -> identification.guid (witness ID).
    witness.signatureguid -> signature.guid (witness signature).
    witness.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

  identification stores per-signing ID scans of signers.
    identification.notaryentryguid -> notaryentry.guid.
    identification.witnessguid -> witness.guid (if ID belongs to a witness).
    identification.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

SIGNER/CLIENT MANAGEMENT (the notary's address book):
  masterclientsigner is the notary's saved client/signer list.
    masterclientsigner.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

  masterclientidentification stores saved ID documents for signers.
    masterclientidentification.signerguid -> masterclientsigner.guid.
    masterclientidentification.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

  combinedclientsignerdata is a denormalized view joining signer + identification.
    combinedclientsignerdata.signerguid -> masterclientsigner.guid.
    combinedclientsignerdata.notaryentryguid -> notaryentry.guid.
    combinedclientsignerdata.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

SIGNING-TO-SIGNER JUNCTION TABLES (link signers to specific signings):
  signingmasterclientsigner maps which signers participated in a signing.
    signingmasterclientsigner.signingguid -> signing.guid.
    signingmasterclientsigner.signerguid -> masterclientsigner.guid.
    signingmasterclientsigner.notaryentryguid -> notaryentry.guid.
    signingmasterclientsigner.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

  signingmasterclientidentification maps which IDs were presented at a signing.
    signingmasterclientidentification.signingguid -> signing.guid.
    signingmasterclientidentification.masterclientsignerguid -> masterclientsigner.guid.
    signingmasterclientidentification.identificationguid -> identification.guid.
    signingmasterclientidentification.notaryentryguid -> notaryentry.guid.
    signingmasterclientidentification.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

BILLING & SUBSCRIPTIONS:
  subscriptiontier defines available plans (pricing, limits, trial periods).
  subscription tracks a user's plan.
    subscription.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    subscription.subscriptiontierguid -> subscriptiontier.guid.
    subscription.paymentcardguid -> paymentcard.guid.
  paymentcard stores Stripe payment methods.
    paymentcard.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  paymenttxn records charges, refunds, and chargebacks.
    paymenttxn.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    paymenttxn.paymentcardguid -> paymentcard.guid.
    paymenttxn.subscriptionguid -> subscription.guid.

DOCUMENT TEMPLATES:
  doctype defines notarization document types per user.
    doctype.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  doccoll groups document types into collections with preset fees.
    doccoll.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    doccoll.guids contains CSV of doctype guids.
  signingfee records fee line items per signing.
    signingfee.signingguid -> signing.guid.
    signingfee.doccollguid -> doccoll.guid.
    signingfee.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

FILE STORAGE:
  blob stores file/document references (signatures, fingerprints, exports, drafts).
    blob.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    blob.signingguid -> signing.guid.
    blob.refobjguid + blob.refobjtype form a polymorphic reference (refobjtype values: Signature, SignerAuditLog, SigningDraft, Signing, Fingerprint, Witness, JournalExport, Identification, SignerPhoto, ProfilePicture, UserSignature).
  journalexport stores exported journal PDF archives.
    journalexport.blobguid -> blob.guid.
    journalexport.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  signingdraft stores in-progress draft signings.
    signingdraft.blobguid -> blob.guid.
    signingdraft.deviceguid -> device.guid.
    signingdraft.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

USER PROFILES & PREFERENCES:
  userprofile stores notary commission profiles (state, commission number, expiration). One user can have multiple profiles for different jurisdictions.
    userprofile.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  usersignature stores notary signature/seal images.
    usersignature.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    usersignature.userprofileguid -> userprofile.guid.
  userscanpreference controls which ID scan fields to capture.
    userscanpreference.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  usernotificationpreference manages notification opt-outs.
    usernotificationpreference.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  location stores saved notarization addresses.
    location.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.

ACCESS CONTROL (RBAC):
  role, permission, resource are reference tables.
  rolepermissionmap links roles to permissions on resources.
    rolepermissionmap.roleguid -> role.guid.
    rolepermissionmap.permissionguid -> permission.guid.
    rolepermissionmap.resourceguid -> resource.guid.
  userrolemap assigns roles to users.
    userrolemap.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    userrolemap.roleguid -> role.guid.

MULTI-TENANCY & SHARING:
  tenant supports hierarchical organizations.
    tenant.parentguid -> tenant.guid (self-referential).
  usermaster.tenantguid -> tenant.guid.
  sharerequest enables cross-user journal sharing (only table with declared FKs).
    sharerequest.fromusermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    sharerequest.tousermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
    sharerequest.tenantguid / fromtenantguid / totenantguid -> tenant.guid.

OTHER:
  apikey: per-user API keys. apikey.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  device: registered mobile devices. device.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  userlogin: login audit log. userlogin.usermasterguid -> usermaster.guid.
  appversion: minimum app versions per platform (standalone reference table).
  featureflags: feature toggles with optional per-user targeting via userguidcsv (CSV of user guids, not a FK).
  systemsettings: key-value app configuration (standalone reference table).

COMMON JOIN PATTERNS:
  User's signings: signing JOIN usermaster ON signing.usermasterguid = usermaster.guid
  Signing's entries: notaryentry JOIN signing ON notaryentry.signingguid = signing.guid
  Entry's signatures: signature JOIN notaryentry ON signature.notaryentryguid = notaryentry.guid
  Entry's signers: signingmasterclientsigner JOIN notaryentry ON signingmasterclientsigner.notaryentryguid = notaryentry.guid JOIN masterclientsigner ON signingmasterclientsigner.signerguid = masterclientsigner.guid
  Signer's IDs: masterclientidentification JOIN masterclientsigner ON masterclientidentification.signerguid = masterclientsigner.guid
  User's subscription: subscription JOIN usermaster ON subscription.usermasterguid = usermaster.guid JOIN subscriptiontier ON subscription.subscriptiontierguid = subscriptiontier.guid
  Payment history: paymenttxn JOIN paymentcard ON paymenttxn.paymentcardguid = paymentcard.guid JOIN subscription ON paymenttxn.subscriptionguid = subscription.guid
